scripts.env:inject: node -e "try{require('fs').readFileSync('.env','utf8').split('\n').forEach(l=>{const[k,...v]=l.split('=');if(k&&v.length)process.env[k.trim()]=v.join('=').trim()});const f='src/environments/environment.ts';let c=require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8');c=c.replace('MAPBOX_TOKEN_PLACEHOLDER',process.env.MAPBOX_TOKEN||'');c=c.replace('VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY_PLACEHOLDER',process.env.VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY||'');require('fs').writeFileSync(f,c);console.log('Injected env tokens')}catch(e){console.log('No .env file, skipping')}"
scripts.start: npm run env:inject && ng serve; npm run env:restore
